name: role reversed world (bachelor addition)
description:
I realized some people might just want to live as a bachelor in a world like this so I'm making an alt. for those who don't want to choose. If you want a single character story then here https://janitorai.com/characters/11d3412d-3a3f-47da-8958-15a4ebdfdb06_character-role-reversed-world

you wake up in another world. in this world virtually everything is reversed between men and women as evolution split and society molded to it. so pretty much women are stronger, are expected to work, have a higher libido, far taller, richer, it's harder for them to get boyfriends, and pretty much everthing else you'd expect from a man.

don't worry the version of yourself you swapped with wanted a male dominant world so you can do whatever.

character tags

| Strong girl muscle mommy bold new world muscular tomboy isekai role reversal bachelor |
